identity.title: Heaven & Hell (Honey & Venom Remix)
identity.styleSentence: A hyper-energetic 136 BPM bashment riddim driven by massive sound-system bass, aggressive Caribbean drums, and overdriven 808s, featuring hypnotic female vocals that dominate a neon-soaked nightclub atmosphere with cinematic breakdowns and intense call-and-response toasting.

lyrics.text:
Mmm,
mmm,
everybody got an angel's eye, mmm,
everybody got a devil's eye, tonight,
I want
both,
both,
both,
both,
both,
both,
both,
both,
heaven,
hell,
honey and venom, honey
and venom,
you look like hell,
but we fuckin' like hell,
hands on my waist while the whole
room swell,
you look like hell,
but we fuckin' like hell,
everybody watchin' but they know
us well,
honey and venom,
runnin' under my skin,
kiss me deep,
baby,
pull me back in,
you look like hell,
but we fuckin' like hell,
sweet little danger under your spell,
heaven,
hell, honey, venom, hell,
honey.
She walk in slow motion,
whole club freeze up,
gold on her body,
but the ice a deeper,
dress red in her,
bass gettin' lower,
one more wine and the room gettin' slower,
sweet
like honey,
but the attitude wicked,
one little touch and me whole mind shifted,
pillow in
the strobe light,
devil in the grin,
everybody know trouble soon as she walk in me,
I know
better,
still I stay,
red lights dancin' on your face,
one more warning,
one more spell,
you look like heaven,
but we love like hell,
hell.
You look like heaven,
but we fuckin' like hell,
hands on my waist while the whole room
swell,
you look like heaven,
but we fuckin' like hell,
everybody watchin' but they know
us well,
honey and venom,
runnin' under my skin,
kiss me deep,
baby,
pull me back in,
you look like heaven,
but we fuckin' like hell,
sweet little danger under your spell.
One,
two,
don't stop,
bass beat,
heart drop,
hands high,
eyes shut,
one more kiss,
too
much, you got the sugar.
Every time I leave,
you pull me back in,
one more night,
one more lie,
one more chance,
boy,
don't lie,
dangerous God,
dangerous boy,
why you always playin' with fire,
because
the burn feel good,
why you always break the rules,
because I wish you could,
tell me one
good reason, I should walk away.
Don't walk away!
Don't walk away!
You look like heaven.
You look like heaven.
You look like heaven.
You look like heaven.
You look like heaven, but we fuckin' like hell
Whole dance, all singin', every word we tell
You look like heaven, but we fuckin' like hell
Sweet temptation, let me know it well
Honey and venom, runnin' through my veins
Honey and venom, dancin' in the rain
Honey and venom, burnin' through the dawn
Sweet little poison, got the whole world on
Hell
Honey, venom,
kiss me deep
One more time, honey and venom
Heaven

analysis.summary: A sultry dancehall anthem about a forbidden attraction where an alluring figure embodies both dangerous temptation and divine beauty.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Anticipation and low hum of tension

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Internal conflict between desire and morality

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Visualizing the object of desire with luxury and heat

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Desperate bargaining with fate and desire

sections.name: Drop
sections.emotion: Pure sonic assault of the bassline and hypnotic rhythm

sections.name: Breakdown/Bridge 2
sections.emotion: Hypnotic repetition leading to trance state

keywords.imageryPrompt: A golden viscous liquid dripping from a silver goblet onto dark stone, glowing with an inner blue light that illuminates the surrounding shadows.
Sunlight filtering through thick amber syrup in slow motion, trapping dust motes and creating a sticky, warm golden haze against dark wood textures.
Sharp white rectangular beams of light slicing through smoke-filled air at nightclubs, freezing sweat on skin and illuminating neon outlines in high contrast black and white.
A hand clutching a chest wound where flames lick the flesh but feel warm rather than hot, surrounded by ash that sparkles like diamonds in low light.
Two lips meeting under red emergency lights where one is coated in shimmering green poison dust and the other in golden honey, creating a swirling vortex of colors.
A figure draped in tattered velvet robes standing atop a pile of burning money and broken crosses, eyes glowing with electric blue fire against a stormy sky.
A swirling vortex of red ribbons and smoke forming an intricate geometric pattern above a sweating dancer's face, blurring the background into deep obsidian black.
Blue electricity arcing across wet skin in a dark room, illuminating veins that glow faintly purple as the subject shivers under harsh neon club lighting.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)
